calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Plaintiffs Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-30-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Blackbird Air, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Marc R. Stimpert, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Christine Tseng, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Blackbird Air, Inc.
Plaintiff's complaint for breach of contract was filed on May 14, 2018 and served on June 6, 2018.
Default was entered against defendant on July 23, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on August 27, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Christine Tseng, and against the Defaulted Defendant Blackbird Air, Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $37,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,575.56.
Costs - $653.78.

Total - $40,299.34.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2018 Continued To Dec-05-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
